title: The Countdown Tightens
description: On pages 9–13, this part focuses on the countdown tightens, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Countdown Tightens. Vivi and the crew continue the desperate hunt for the shooter and the bomb as the countdown shrinks. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's right! I still have my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No matter how many times we fight,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You will NEVER be able to land even a single punch on me...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So you want me to impale you again, do you!?

summary: This part develops the countdown tightens and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
